title: Interaction Contract
description: Defines interaction requirements for a target entity or system.

interaction_type.description: Interaction tier: passive (no requirements), physical (tool), linked (interface port), secured (port + breach).

requires_port.description: If true, interface port module must be installed.

requires_helmet.description: If true, helmet must be deployed for HUD feedback.

requires_module.description: Module ID that must be installed for this interaction.

required_rig_tier.description: Minimum R.I.G. tier for this interaction.

breach_difficulty.description: Breach minigame difficulty. 0 = no breach needed.
